podcast: [Tools to Bolster Your Mental Health & Confidence | Dr. Paul Conti] Dr. Paul Conti, MD, is a board-certified psychiatrist and an expert in how to improve mental health and increase your sense of agency and wellbeing. He is also an expert in trauma treatment. We discuss practical tools you can use to gain insight into your natural strengths and to make better life choices on your own behalf. youtube_items.title: [YT] Global Inequality in 2025: Why the Rich Keep Getting Richer
youtube_items.summary: In the year 2025, the issue of global inequality remains a daunting challenge for humanity. Today, we explore the ever widening gap between rich and poor, a divide that continues to shape our world socially, economically, and politically. Despite technological advancements and economic growth, the chasm seems wider than ever, sparking debates and concerns across various platforms. The disparity between wealth and poverty isn't just a statistic. It's a reality impacting billions of lives. While a small percentage of the global population enjoys unprecedented riches, a staggering number of people struggle to meet basic needs. In 2025, it's estimated that the top 1% of the world's richest individuals control nearly half of the global wealth, whereas billions are barely surviving on a few doll

youtube_items.title: [YT] Global Health Inequality
youtube_items.summary: My name is Jessica Whistler and I am here to talk about the global health inequality and I am in international relations class for 2025. I chose this topic because of reasons outside of my major that I hold close to my heart. I live through a major health crisis and watch my mother go to work every day as a nurse. She has been helping people all of my life and is something that I look up to. While my political science major does play a role in solving in solving the global healthc care inequalities, there is another reason I chose this topic. Over the next summer, I plan to help in the healthc care field with my mother at her job. And this would be the perfect opportunity to learn more about where my future will be. I am hoping to get insight on differences in the health care and how our l

summary: Анализът показва, че независимо от напредъка в здравеопазването и дигитализацията, глобалната неравенство продължава да е критична проблем. Достъпът до здраве и медицински услуги остава неравномерен, което противоречи визията за устойчива цивилизация.
